---
title: Open Replicable Research by the International Biometric Society
categories: Conference
event:
  description: ''
  start_date: '2023-10-05'
  end_date: '2023-10-06'
  time: ''
  location:
    name: Großhadern, Butenandtstr. 5, Room B0.022
    address: ''
    map_url: ''
  format:
    type: Conference
    detail: ''
  language:
    primary: English
    primary-code: en
    detail: ''
links:
  registration: ''
  materials: ''
  workshop_website: ''
event_description: ''
instructors:
  - name: ''
    url: ''
helpers:
  - name: ''
contact:
  name: Sabine Hoffmann
  email: sabine.hoffmann@stat.uni-muenchen.de
organizers:
  - name: Sabine Hoffmann
    url: ''
  - name: Michael Lauseker
    url: ''
host:
  - name: '"""Ethics and Responsibility"" working group of the IBS-DR"'
    url: ''
  - name: LMU Open Science Center
    url: ''
  - name: LMU Institute for Medical Information Processing, Biometry, and Epidemiology
      (IBE)
    url: ''
  - name: LMU Institute for Statistics
    url: ''
presenters:
  - name: Prof. Dr. Ulrich Dirnagl 
    url: ''
  - name: Prof. Dr. Ioana Cristea 
    url: ''

template: templates/event-template.html
filters:
    - templates/process-event-yaml.lua
---

<br>

<p>
We cordially invite you to the <strong>workshop "Open Replicable Research"</strong> on <strong>October 5th and 6th in Munich</strong>. 
The workshop is organized by the AG "Ethik und Verantwortung" of the 
<a href="https://www.biometrische-gesellschaft.de/">IBS-DR</a> 
in cooperation with the Open Science Center der LMU, the 
<a href="https://www.ibe.med.uni-muenchen.de/index.html">IBE</a> 
and the 
<a href="https://www.stat.lmu.de/en/">Department of Statistics</a>. 
We are delighted to welcome 
<a href="https://www.charite.de/service/person/person/address_detail/prof_dr_med_ulrich_dirnagl-1">Prof. Dr. Ulrich Dirnagl</a> 
from Berlin and 
<a href="https://www.dpg.unipd.it/en/en/ioana-alina-cristea">Prof. Dr. Ioana Cristea</a> 
from Padova as invited speakers. 
<strong>Prof. Cristea</strong> will speak about 
<strong>"Implementation of data sharing in clinical research: tractable and intractable problems"</strong>, 
<strong>Prof. Dirnagl</strong> will give a talk on 
<strong>"Can statistics save preclinical research?"</strong>.
</p>

<p>
The workshop will cover two half days. On the afternoon of October 5th the topic will be "Data Sharing", while the morning of October 6th is dedicated to <strong>"Replicability"</strong>. 
<a href="https://www.ibe.med.uni-muenchen.de/services/workshopregistrierung/formular-workshop/program.pdf">You can find the program here.</a>
</p>

<p>
In the context of the workshop, our working group meeting with speaker elections will also take place.
</p>

<p>
The workshop will take place at Butenandtstr. 5 (München-Großhadern), 
<a href="https://www.ibe.med.uni-muenchen.de/services/workshopregistrierung/formular-workshop/directions_docx.pdf">you can find the directions here.</a> 
<strong>The participation in the workshop is free of charge.</strong>
</p>

<p>
We are looking forward to welcoming you in Munich in October!
</p>

<p>
&ndash; Sabine Hoffmann und Michael Lauseker for the AG "Ethik und Verantwortung"
</p>
